scenes.npcDialog: Good morning! May I see your passport and booking confirmation?
Do you have a seat preference? Window or aisle?
scenes.npcDialogKo: 좌석 선호가 있으신가요? 창가 아니면 통로?

choices.text: I want to sit on the wing.

scenes.npcDialog: How many bags are you checking in today?

choices.text: I want to check in myself.

scenes.npcDialog: Please place your laptop and liquids in a separate tray.
Please step aside. Do you have anything metal in your pockets?

choices.text: Oh, I forgot my belt. Let me remove it.
I might have some coins. Here they are.

scenes.npcDialog: Can I help you find something?

choices.text: I'm looking for my gate. It's gate 25.

scenes.npcDialog: Would you like to see anything in particular?
We're now boarding rows 20 to 35. May I see your boarding pass?
Can I help you find your seat?
Let me help you with your bag. Is this your carry-on?
scenes.npcDialogKo: 가방 넣는 것 도와드릴게요. 이게 기내용 가방인가요?

scenes.npcDialog: What would you like to drink? We have juice, water, coffee, and tea.
scenes.npcDialogKo: 음료는 뭘로 드릴까요? 주스, 물, 커피, 차가 있습니다.

scenes.npcDialog: For your meal, would you like beef or chicken?
scenes.npcDialogKo: 식사로 소고기와 닭고기 중 뭘로 드릴까요?

scenes.npcDialog: Is there anything else I can get for you?

choices.text: Could I get a blanket, please?
I want to sleep in first class.

scenes.npcDialog: Excuse me, the seatbelt sign is on. Could you wait a moment?
scenes.npcDialogKo: 죄송합니다, 안전벨트 사인이 켜져있어요. 잠시 기다려주시겠어요?

choices.text: Okay, I'll go back to my seat.
I don't care about the sign.

scenes.npcDialog: Do you need help filling out the arrival card?

choices.text: Yes, what should I write for 'purpose of visit'?
Where do I write my hotel address?

scenes.npcDialog: Would you like headphones for the entertainment system?

choices.text: That would be great, thank you.

scenes.npcDialog: Please return to your seat and fasten your seatbelt. We're experiencing turbulence.
scenes.npcDialogKo: 좌석으로 돌아가 안전벨트를 매주세요. 난기류가 있습니다.

choices.text: Okay, I'll sit down right away.
Is it going to be a rough ride?

scenes.npcDialog: We'll be landing in 30 minutes. Please put your tray table up and seat in the upright position.
scenes.npcDialogKo: 30분 후 착륙합니다. 테이블을 접고 좌석을 바로 세워주세요.

choices.text: Okay, thank you for letting me know.

scenes.situation: 유럽 최대 허브 공항 중 하나인 프랑크푸르트에 도착했다. 효율적인 독일 시스템.
scenes.npcDialog: Willkommen! Welcome to Frankfurt. Your connecting flight to Amsterdam is in Terminal 1, Gate B. You have 2 hours - follow the signs.
scenes.npcDialogKo: 빌코멘! 프랑크푸르트에 오신 것을 환영합니다. 암스테르담 연결편은 터미널 1, 게이트 B예요. 2시간 있어요 - 표지판 따라가세요.

choices.text: Danke! Is 2 hours enough time if I want to grab something to eat?
Thank you! How long is the walk to Gate B?
Why only 2 hours? That's too short.

choices.feedback: 프랑크푸르트 공항은 표지판이 잘 되어 있습니다.

scenes.situation: 짧은 환승 시간이지만 독일 맥주를 맛보고 싶다.
scenes.npcDialog: German beer before your flight? We have Weissbier, Pilsner, Dunkel. Brezel - pretzel - goes perfect with beer!
scenes.npcDialogKo: 비행 전에 독일 맥주요? 바이스비어, 필스너, 둔켈 있어요. 브레첼 - 프레첼 - 맥주랑 완벽해요!

choices.text: I'll try a small Weissbier and a pretzel. Prost!
choices.feedback: 독일 맥주 문화를 경험하며 건배를 외칩니다.

choices.text: What's the difference between these beers?
choices.feedback: 맥주 종류에 대해 물어보는 것이 좋습니다.

scenes.situation: 암스테르담행 비행기 탑승. 짧은 유럽 내 비행이다.
scenes.npcDialog: Boarding for Amsterdam. Flight time only 50 minutes. Auf Wiedersehen! Have a good stay in the Netherlands!
scenes.npcDialogKo: 암스테르담행 탑승입니다. 비행 시간 50분밖에 안 돼요. 아우프 비더제헨! 네덜란드에서 좋은 시간 보내세요!

choices.text: Danke schön! Such a short flight - I'll barely sit down!
choices.feedback: 짧은 비행에 대한 재치 있는 코멘트입니다.

choices.text: Only 50 minutes? That's quick! Auf Wiedersehen!
50 minutes? Why did I have to transfer then?
choices.feedback: 직항이 없거나 비용 문제일 수 있습니다.

scenes.npcDialog: What is the purpose of your visit?
How long will you be staying?

choices.text: I'll be here for two weeks.

scenes.npcDialog: Where will you be staying?

choices.text: I'm staying at the Hilton Hotel.
At a hotel in the city center.

scenes.npcDialog: Do you have a return ticket?

choices.text: Yes, I'm flying back on the 15th.

scenes.npcDialog: Which carousel is your luggage on?

choices.text: I'm not sure. My flight was from Seoul.

scenes.npcDialog: Is there a problem with your luggage?

choices.text: Yes, my bag hasn't come out yet.
I can't find my suitcase. It's a black one.

scenes.npcDialog: How much would you like to exchange?

choices.text: Can I exchange 300 dollars to euros?

scenes.npcDialog: Today's rate is 1.08 euros per dollar. Is that okay?
How can I help you today?

choices.text: How do I get to the city center?
What's the best way to get downtown?

scenes.npcDialog: Where would you like to go?

choices.text: One ticket to Central Station, please.
How much is a ticket to the city center?

scenes.npcDialog: Good evening! Do you have a reservation?

choices.text: Yes, I have a reservation under Kim.
Yes, I booked online. Here's my confirmation.
No, but give me the best room.

scenes.npcDialog: Your room includes breakfast. It's served from 7 to 10 AM.

choices.text: Great, where is the breakfast room?
Perfect, thank you for the information.

scenes.npcDialog: Is there anything else you need?

choices.text: Could you tell me the WiFi password?

scenes.npcDialog: The Hollywood Sign is best from Griffith Observatory! Built in 1923 for real estate ads. Each letter is 45 feet tall. Best photos at golden hour!
scenes.npcDialogKo: 할리우드 사인은 그리피스 천문대에서 제일 잘 보여요! 1923년 부동산 광고로 세워졌어요. 각 글자가 45피트예요. 골든아워에 사진 최고!

choices.text: 45 feet per letter! It's bigger than I imagined.
Built for real estate? That's funny history!
It's just letters on a hill.
I can see it in movies.

scenes.npcDialog: LA has the best tacos outside Mexico! Al pastor, carnitas, or carne asada? Cilantro, onion, lime, and salsa verde. Street tacos are the real deal!
scenes.npcDialogKo: LA에 멕시코 밖 최고 타코가 있어요! 알 파스토르, 카르니타스, 카르네 아사다? 고수, 양파, 라임, 살사 베르데. 스트릿 타코가 진짜예요!

choices.text: Al pastor please! I love pineapple with pork.
Street tacos! What makes LA tacos special?

scenes.npcDialog: Warner Bros Studio Tour! See Friends Central Perk, Batman sets, Harry Potter props. You might see actual filming! Very exclusive experience.
scenes.npcDialogKo: 워너 브라더스 스튜디오 투어! 프렌즈 센트럴 퍼크, 배트맨 세트, 해리포터 소품 봐요. 실제 촬영 볼 수도 있어요! 아주 특별한 경험이에요.

choices.text: Central Perk! Can I sit on the couch?
Actual filming! Do we need to be quiet?

scenes.npcDialog: Welcome! Would you like an audio guide with your ticket?
scenes.npcDialogKo: 환영합니다! 티켓과 함께 오디오 가이드 원하세요?

choices.text: Yes, do you have one in Korean?
How much is the audio guide?

scenes.npcDialog: Hop-on hop-off bus? You can get off at any of our 20 stops.
scenes.npcDialogKo: 홉온홉오프 버스요? 20개 정류장 어디서든 내릴 수 있어요.

choices.text: Which stop is closest to the main square?
How often does the bus come?

scenes.npcDialog: Can I help you with anything?
Welcome! You booked a 6-bed dorm, right? Here's your locker key.
scenes.npcDialogKo: 환영합니다! 6인실 도미토리 예약하셨죠? 여기 락커 키입니다.

choices.text: Yes, that's correct. Where is my bed?
I want a private room now.

scenes.npcDialog: Do you need help with the bus?

choices.text: Which bus goes to the old town?
How much is the bus fare?

scenes.npcDialog: Walk of Fame has over 2,700 stars! Look for your favorite celebrity. The stars are for movies, TV, music, radio, and theater. Any favorites?
scenes.npcDialogKo: 명예의 거리에 2,700개 넘는 별이 있어요! 좋아하는 유명인 찾아보세요. 영화, TV, 음악, 라디오, 연극 별이에요. 좋아하는 사람 있어요?

choices.text: I want to find my favorite actor's star!
It's just stars on the ground.

scenes.npcDialog: Rodeo Drive is luxury central! Chanel, Gucci, Louis Vuitton. Window shopping is free! The Pretty Woman bench is here for photos.
scenes.npcDialogKo: 로데오 드라이브는 럭셔리 중심지! 샤넬, 구찌, 루이비통. 아이쇼핑은 무료예요! 귀여운 여인 벤치에서 사진 찍어요.

choices.text: Pretty Woman was filmed here! Where's the bench?
Window shopping is fun! The displays are art.

scenes.npcDialog: LA Koreatown is the largest outside Korea! Our KBBQ is 24 hours. Unlimited meat and banchan. Soju? This is like Seoul!
scenes.npcDialogKo: LA 코리아타운이 한국 외 최대예요! 저희 한국 BBQ는 24시간이에요. 무한리필 고기와 반찬. 소주요? 여기가 서울 같아요!

choices.text: Feels like Seoul! What banchan do you have?
Why eat Korean food in America?

scenes.npcDialog: Would you like me to take your picture?

choices.text: Yes, please! Just press this button.
Thank you! Could you take a few?

scenes.npcDialog: Our night tour shows you the city all lit up. Interested?
scenes.npcDialogKo: 야경 투어로 조명이 켜진 도시를 보여드려요. 관심 있으세요?

choices.text: Yes! What time does it start?
That sounds beautiful. How long is it?

scenes.npcDialog: Would you like to take a break?

choices.text: Where can I sit and rest?

scenes.npcDialog: The shared kitchen is on the first floor. Do you have any questions?

choices.text: Can I store food in the fridge?
What time does the kitchen close?

scenes.npcDialog: Are you looking for something?

choices.text: Is the museum within walking distance?
How long does it take to walk there?

scenes.npcDialog: Santa Monica Pier! The Ferris wheel is solar-powered. Ride the carousel from 1922. Pacific Park has rollercoasters! And the beach is right there!
scenes.npcDialogKo: 산타모니카 피어예요! 대관람차가 태양광이에요. 1922년 회전목마 타보세요. 퍼시픽 파크에 롤러코스터! 바로 옆이 해변이에요!

choices.text: A carousel from 1922! Is it the original?

scenes.npcDialog: Griffith Observatory has the best LA views! Free entry, free telescopes at night. The planetarium shows are awesome. Stay for sunset and city lights!
scenes.npcDialogKo: 그리피스 천문대 LA 전망 최고예요! 무료 입장, 밤에 무료 망원경. 플라네타리움 쇼 끝내줘요. 일몰과 야경까지 있어요!

choices.text: Free telescopes! Can I see the Hollywood Sign too?
Sunset to city lights - I'll stay the whole evening!
I can see the city from anywhere.

scenes.npcDialog: Dodger Stadium is baseball heaven! Hot dogs, Dodger Dogs are famous. Get there early for batting practice. The sunset over the field is iconic!
scenes.npcDialogKo: 다저 스타디움은 야구 천국이에요! 핫도그, 다저 도그가 유명해요. 배팅 연습 보려면 일찍 가세요. 경기장 위 일몰이 아이콘이에요!

choices.text: Dodger Dogs! That's the true baseball experience.
Sunset at the stadium sounds beautiful!

scenes.npcDialog: Can I help you find something?

choices.text: Where's the best spot for photos?
Where can I get the best view?
Take me to a secret place.

scenes.npcDialog: This building dates back to the 17th century.

choices.text: What was it used for back then?
I don't care about old stuff.

scenes.npcDialog: Looking for a good place to eat nearby?

choices.text: Can you recommend a local favorite?
I only eat at my hotel.

scenes.npcDialog: Is this your first time at a hostel?

choices.text: Yes, where are the shared bathrooms?
Where can I take a shower?

scenes.npcDialog: We have a free walking tour starting at 10 AM. Interested?
scenes.npcDialogKo: 오전 10시에 무료 워킹투어가 있어요. 관심 있으세요?

choices.text: Yes! How long is the tour?
If it's free, it's probably bad.

scenes.npcDialog: In-N-Out is a California icon! Try the Double-Double. Ask for Animal Style - special sauce, grilled onions, extra pickles. Secret menu!
scenes.npcDialogKo: 인앤아웃은 캘리포니아 상징이에요! 더블더블 드셔보세요. 애니멀 스타일로 - 특제 소스, 그릴드 어니언, 피클 추가. 시크릿 메뉴예요!

choices.text: Animal Style! I love secret menu items.
Double-Double sounds perfect. What's in it?

scenes.npcDialog: The Grove has everything! Farmers Market since 1934. Korean BBQ tacos, acai bowls, LA's best donuts. Fusion food was invented here!
scenes.npcDialogKo: 더 그로브에 다 있어요! 1934년부터 파머스 마켓. 한국식 BBQ 타코, 아사이볼, LA 최고 도넛. 퓨전 푸드가 여기서 탄생했어요!

choices.text: Korean BBQ tacos! Only in LA!
Farmers Market since 1934! What's the must-try?

scenes.npcDialog: Melrose is LA's hippest street! Vintage shops, sneaker stores, and the famous Paul Smith pink wall. Perfect for Instagram. Very LA!
scenes.npcDialogKo: 멜로즈는 LA에서 가장 힙한 거리예요! 빈티지숍, 스니커즈 가게, 유명한 폴 스미스 핑크 벽. 인스타그램 딱이에요. 아주 LA다워요!

choices.text: The pink wall! I've seen it everywhere on Instagram.
Vintage and sneakers? My kind of shopping!

scenes.npcDialog: The observation deck closes at 10 PM. Enjoy the view!

choices.text: Great! Is sunset time around 7 today?
Thank you! Can I bring food up there?
I want to stay all night.

scenes.npcDialog: Do you have any questions about your visit?

choices.text: What time do you close today?
Is the museum open on weekends?

scenes.npcDialog: Nice day to relax in the park, isn't it?

choices.text: It really is! Is it okay to sit on the grass?
Beautiful! Are there any cafes nearby?
I came here to shop, not relax.

scenes.npcDialog: Your ticket includes only cabin baggage. Do you have checked luggage?
scenes.npcDialogKo: 티켓에는 기내 수하물만 포함되어 있어요. 위탁 수하물 있으세요?

choices.text: How much extra for checked baggage?
I only have carry-on, so I'm fine.

scenes.npcDialog: Cooking tonight? There's a supermarket around the corner.
scenes.npcDialogKo: 오늘 저녁 요리하세요? 코너 돌면 슈퍼마켓 있어요.

choices.text: Great! Do they have fresh vegetables?
Cooking is a waste of time.

scenes.npcDialog: Universal Studios Hollywood! The studio tour shows real film sets. Harry Potter, Jurassic World, The Simpsons - which world first?
scenes.npcDialogKo: 유니버설 스튜디오 할리우드! 스튜디오 투어에서 실제 영화 세트를 봐요. 해리포터, 쥬라기 월드, 심슨 - 어느 세계 먼저요?

choices.text: Harry Potter first! I want to try butterbeer!
The studio tour with real sets sounds amazing!
I'm too old for theme parks.

scenes.npcDialog: Disneyland - the original! Walt Disney walked these streets. Star Wars: Galaxy's Edge is incredible. The fireworks show is magical!
scenes.npcDialogKo: 디즈니랜드 - 원조예요! 월트 디즈니가 이 거리를 걸었어요. 스타워즈: 갤럭시스 엣지가 대단해요. 불꽃놀이 쇼가 마법 같아요!

choices.text: The original Disneyland! What ride should I do first?
Galaxy's Edge! Can I build my own lightsaber?

scenes.npcDialog: Hollywood Bowl is iconic! Outdoor amphitheater under the stars. Bring a picnic! Classical, rock, pop - everyone plays here. Only in LA!
scenes.npcDialogKo: 할리우드 볼은 아이콘이에요! 별 아래 야외 원형극장. 피크닉 가져오세요! 클래식, 록, 팝 - 모두가 여기서 공연해요. LA에서만!

choices.text: Picnic at a concert! That's so California.
Under the stars! What's playing tonight?

scenes.npcDialog: The boat tour is about 1 hour. Would you like window seats?
scenes.npcDialogKo: 보트 투어는 약 1시간이에요. 창가 좌석 원하세요?

choices.text: Yes, please. Can we sit on the upper deck?
Are there any commentary in English?

scenes.npcDialog: Is there anything else you'd like to know?

choices.text: Can I leave and come back later?
Is re-entry allowed with this ticket?

scenes.npcDialog: What can I get for you?

choices.text: One kebab, please. How much is it?
What's the cheapest thing on the menu?
Is this food safe to eat?

scenes.npcDialog: Regular admission is 15 euros.

choices.text: Do you have any free admission days?

scenes.npcDialog: Venice Beach is LA's eccentric side! Muscle Beach gym, street performers, Abbot Kinney shops. The boardwalk has amazing people watching!
scenes.npcDialogKo: 베니스 비치는 LA의 별난 면이에요! 머슬 비치 짐, 거리 공연자, 애벗 키니 상점들. 보드워크에서 사람 구경 끝내줘요!

choices.text: Muscle Beach! I've seen it in so many movies.
Venice looks so creative and free-spirited!

scenes.npcDialog: Malibu is celebrity beach! Drive Pacific Coast Highway for amazing views. Zuma Beach is beautiful. You might spot movie stars!
scenes.npcDialogKo: 말리부는 셀럽 해변이에요! 퍼시픽 코스트 하이웨이 드라이브 경치 끝내줘요. 주마 비치가 예뻐요. 영화배우 볼 수도 있어요!

choices.text: PCH drive! I've seen it in so many movies.

scenes.npcDialog: Your last LA sunset! California cuisine - fresh, local, healthy. Fish tacos, craft cocktails, and that ocean view. See you again soon - this is LA!
scenes.npcDialogKo: LA 마지막 일몰이네요! 캘리포니아 요리 - 신선하고, 로컬, 건강해요. 피쉬 타코, 크래프트 칵테일, 그 오션 뷰. 또 오세요 - 여기가 LA예요!

choices.text: Perfect way to end the trip! I'll miss this view.
Fish tacos at sunset - so California!

scenes.npcDialog: Looking for souvenirs? These are our bestsellers.

choices.text: Do you have anything under 20 euros?
Souvenirs are a waste of money.

scenes.npcDialog: Are you traveling together? Need a group photo?

choices.text: Yes! Could you take one of all of us?
That would be great, thank you!

scenes.npcDialog: Welcome! Would you like a meal or just a sandwich?

choices.text: How much is the value meal?

scenes.npcDialog: Looking for luggage storage?

choices.text: Yes, how much for a small locker?
I'll just leave it on the floor.

scenes.npcDialog: Getty Center is free! Van Gogh, Monet, Rembrandt. The architecture by Richard Meier is stunning. Take the tram up - great city views!
scenes.npcDialogKo: 게티 센터는 무료예요! 반 고흐, 모네, 렘브란트. 리처드 마이어 건축이 끝내줘요. 트램 타고 올라가요 - 시티 뷰 좋아요!

choices.text: Free admission with Van Gogh! This is amazing!
The building looks like a work of art itself.

scenes.npcDialog: Welcome! A car is essential in LA. Compact or SUV? GPS included. Convertible for the PCH? Remember - traffic is real, plan extra time!
scenes.npcDialogKo: 환영해요! LA에서 차는 필수예요. 컴팩트? SUV? GPS 포함이에요. PCH 드라이브에 컨버터블? 기억하세요 - 교통체증 심하니까 시간 여유 두세요!

choices.text: Convertible for the coast! Perfect for LA.
How bad is the traffic really?

scenes.npcDialog: How can I help you plan your day?

choices.text: Do you have a city map?

scenes.npcDialog: How many days are you staying?

choices.text: Can you recommend a walking route?
Just tell me the best thing.

scenes.npcDialog: Will that be all?

choices.text: Yes, and can you heat this up for me?
Do you have any meal deals?
This is too expensive for a convenience store.

scenes.npcDialog: Can I help you with anything?

choices.text: I just want WiFi, no food.

scenes.npcDialog: Would you like any information materials?

choices.text: Do you have a brochure in Korean?
Can I get a map of the area?
Paper is bad for the environment.

scenes.npcDialog: Are you prepared for the tour?

choices.text: Will we be outside? Should I bring a jacket?
What kind of shoes should I wear?

scenes.npcDialog: This souvenir is 20 euros.

choices.text: Can you give me a discount? How about 15?
Just give it to me for free.

scenes.npcDialog: Front desk, how may I help you?

choices.text: The air conditioning in my room isn't working.
I can't figure out how to adjust the temperature.

scenes.npcDialog: Housekeeping, can I help you?

choices.text: Could I get some extra towels, please?
I need more towels for my room.

scenes.npcDialog: Good morning! How can I assist you today?

choices.text: Could I get a late checkout?

scenes.npcDialog: Are you checking out today?

choices.text: Yes, I'd like to check out.

scenes.npcDialog: Would you like us to store your luggage?

choices.text: Yes, I'll pick it up around 3 PM.
That would be great. My flight is this evening.

scenes.npcDialog: Good evening! Table for how many?
Are you ready to order?

choices.text: Yes, I'll have the pasta, please.
Could I have a few more minutes?

scenes.npcDialog: What would you like to drink?

choices.text: I'll have a glass of water, please.
Could I see the wine list?

scenes.npcDialog: Do you have any food allergies?
Can I get you anything else?
How would you like to pay?

choices.text: Can I pay with credit card?

scenes.npcDialog: Where to?

choices.text: Can you take me to this address?

scenes.npcDialog: That'll be 25 euros.

choices.text: Here you go. Keep the change.

scenes.npcDialog: How can I help you?

choices.text: One ticket to Central Station, please.
How much is a day pass?
I want to ride for free.

scenes.npcDialog: Can I help you with directions?

choices.text: Does this bus go to the museum?
Which bus goes to the city center?

scenes.npcDialog: Excuse me, are you lost?

choices.text: Yes, I'm looking for the train station.
Could you tell me how to get to the museum?

scenes.npcDialog: Good morning! Where are you flying to today?

choices.text: I don't want to go home.

scenes.npcDialog: Last minute shopping? Can I help you find something?
scenes.npcDialogKo: 마지막 쇼핑하세요? 뭔가 찾는 거 도와드릴까요?

choices.text: I'm looking for some chocolate as a gift.
Do you have any local souvenirs?

scenes.npcDialog: Do you need a customs declaration form?

choices.text: Yes, please. What do I need to declare?
Do I need to declare gifts I bought?
